info.title: Tariff Lookup API
info.description: Tariff Lookup API. Look up import/export tariff rates by HTS code or product description. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Look up import/export tariff rates by HTS code or product description.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
